Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • display_name - (Optional) (Updatable) A user-friendly name for the Mac order.
  • order_description - (Required) (Updatable) A description for the Mac order.
  • order_size - (Required) (Updatable) The number of requested Mac devices.
  • shape - (Required) (Updatable) The requested Mac shape.
  • ip_range - (Optional) (Updatable) The customer IP range for the order.
  • compartment_id - (Required) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • commitment_term - (Required) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
